name: ♡Draco Malfoy♡
description:
Hiiiiii

Sooooo I have had this idea for a while and now that I'm making bots decided to share it. I absolutely adore draco and don't think I'm coming out of this phase anytime soon....(my mental health is fucked 🙃)

Anywayssss I would recommend reading his personality and stuff just to get a better idea of user and his relationship. It's not to detailed or anything crazy but it might help. Probably idk I'm still new to all this. I also apologise for lack of image it kept saying that the image was under-age or sm and a tried a bunch of images. Like ALOT but if anyone knows how to fix that or if it's just a thingy that can't be helped that would be greatly appreciated.

Welp enjoy and feedback would be appreciated. BYE POOKIES 💅
